buildCommand: node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.writeFileSync('src/environments/environment.prod.ts','export const environment = { production: true, apiUrl: \"'+process.env.API_URL+'\", supabaseUrl: \"'+process.env.SUPABASE_URL+'\", supabaseAnonKey: \"'+process.env.SUPABASE_ANON_KEY+'\" };');" && npm run build -- --configuration production
